name: io.github.Nodeflare-app/nodeflare-mcp
description: Blockchain JSON-RPC on 23 EVM chains for AI agents - free tier, API key, or x402 pay-per-call.

environmentVariables.name: NODEFLARE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional NodeFlare API key (free at nodeflare.app) — unlocks heavy methods and higher limits

environmentVariables.name: X402_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional EVM private key of a wallet holding USDC on Base/Polygon/Arbitrum — heavy methods are paid per call (~$0.001) via x402
